svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 204, 255), rgb(81, 37, 81)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(201, 37, 209), rgb(255, 124, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 153, 255), rgb(43, 130, 218));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
